feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAC SMTP (smtp.office365.com) configuration with OAuth
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have a requirement to configure SAC - SMTP (smtp.office365.com) with OAuth

So far, I have:

  • Created an application in Azure AD.
  • Assigned the required API permissions.
  • Successfully generated the refresh token in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC)

However, the SMTP connection is still failing

Regards,

Ganesha

entry.title: Numeric Point Widget does not display % sign for variance although "Display Difference As &#61
entry.content:
We identified an issue with an existing Numeric Point widget.

The widget is configured with:

  • Comparison enabled
  • Display Difference As = Percentage
  • Absolute Base Value enabled

 

Reproducibility

  1. Open existing story.
  2. Open existing Numeric Point widget.
  3. Configure comparison and set "Display Difference As = Percentage".
  4. Save and refresh the story.
  5. Variance displays without % sign.

 

Additional Observation

If a completely new Numeric Point widget is created using the same measure and comparison settings, the percentage sign is displayed correctly.

Therefore, the issue appears to be related to the rendering or metadata persistence of existing widgets rather than the underlying calculation.

 

Expected Result

The Numeric Point widget should displ

entry.title: can we able to reset the story level filters in SAC
entry.content:
can we able to reset story level filters in SAC through script? if yes could you please let me know what function I have to use .

note: not page level filters.

entry.title: Issue with PDF export in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) Stories
entry.content:
When I export my SAC Story to PDF, cells containing long text (paragraph-level content) get truncated. Only a portion of the text visible on screen is included in the PDF — the remaining text is lost, even though the underlying data is complete.

I have a Case Activity Log table with columns including:

  • Activity Date
  • Category
  • Type
  • Description
  • Notes ← This column contains multi-paragraph text (medical case notes, RTW forms, patient history, etc.)

What I've Tried

1. Table Widget Styling

  •  Enabled Wrap Text in table cells
  •  Set Row Height to Auto
  • Increased Notes column width to maximum (500+ px)
  •  Reduced font size to 10
  • Result: Table still truncates text visually; PDF still cuts off content

Workaround Attempted: Excel → Word → PDF

  • Exported to XLSX via SAC
  • Opened in Excel → Applied Wrap Text + borders manually
  • Copy-pasted to MS Word (Landscape + A4 + Narrow margins)
  • Saved as PDF from Word
  • Result:  This gives complete content, but it's a manual multi-step process (not user-friendly for business users)

User need to print the report with one click export to pdf without losing data content and human readable font on letter or legal pages.

Just to get more information i made the story as canvas and it still continues to have the issue and cannot print the whole context 

 

Any of the following would be greatly appreciated:

  •  Official SAP documentation on this behavior
  • Native SAC solution or workaround
  •  Best practice for handling large text fields in SAC reports
  •  Confirmation if this is a known limitation
  • Roadmap information for potential improvements

Thank you in advance for any insights!

entry.title: aggregated values for the Linked models. continuation of case#957645/2026
entry.content:
Hi Zahid,

I tested the behavior on the internal tenant by creating a demo story based on two linked models and observed the same behavior.

  • Currently in ODE out of context blending is not supported hence the linked dimension needs to be included in the widget.3513533 - Not possible to create Blended Visualization without linked dimension in Optimized Design Experience (ODE) story mode in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) - SAP for Me 
  • When the dimension is included, the chart will show separate bars for the different Product IDs. This is working as designed.

I did some testing and found a workaround you can use to display an aggregated value:
1. Create a donut chart.
2. Click on the chart more action --> More Options --> Show/Hide --> Total

This will display the aggregated total in the center. I’ve attached a screenshot for reference: ShowTotal.png.  Close it mistakenly.

entry.title: Zertifizierung „SAP Certified – Data Analyst – SAP Analytics Cloud“
entry.content:
Hallo zusammen,

ich bereite mich derzeit auf die Zertifizierung „SAP Certified – Data Analyst – SAP Analytics Cloud“ vor.

Ich folge dem Lernpfad „Becoming a Certified Data Analyst in SAP Analytics Cloud“ und habe die Module „Exploring SAP Analytics Cloud“ und „Performing Manual Planning with SAP Analytics Cloud“ bereits abgeschlossen.

Ich würde mich freuen, mit anderen Lernenden in Kontakt zu treten und Tipps zur Vorbereitung, Ressourcen sowie praktische Lernerfahrungen auszutauschen.

Mit freundlichen Grüßen,
Carine

entry.title: Error when trying to add new member to account dimension SAC/Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am facing the below issue when I am trying to add a new member to the account dimension, it was working before normally.

Anyone have faced this issue before ?

Thanks for the help

entry.title: Custom charts library is missing after QRC 3.2026
entry.content:
Hello!

Custom charts library is being introduced with SAC QRC 3.2026 and should therefore be visible in our preview tenant since today. It should look like this according to SAC help:

Although our tenant is on version 2026.15.1 and the user has the required authorizations, custom widget tab under stories looks the same like it was in QRC 2.2026:

Therefore option to add custom charts within chart builder panel in a story is missing, too.

Is there any additional setting needed in the tenant? Or is this feature postponed without deleting it from SAC help and SAP note?

Thanks in advance!

Best regards

Lothar

entry.title: SAP Business Application Studio
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

SAP business application studio is not moving to next level. Attached the screenshot.

Thanks,

Deepthi

entry.title: SAC Bug: Change in Numeric point widget display is SAC Dashboards
entry.content:
We have observed a change in the behavior of the Numeric Point widget since last week.
Previously, the widget displayed the values with variance as shown below:
Previous display:

  • 63.8 (+4.0, +7%)


Currently, the widget displays the currency code along with both the actual value and the variance:
Current display:

  • CHF63.8 (+CHF4.0, +7%)


We have investigated the available formatting options in the story and verified the configuration. Based on our analysis, we are currently unable to suppress only the currency code (CHF) while retaining the numeric values and percentage comparison. The available formatting options do not provide the ability to hide the currency text independently.

entry.title: Create Model
entry.content:
Hello Team, 

why I coudn't create model from the file , the create button not working, and the selection not open any chose, what is behind that, I used sandbox for training purpose

entry.title: Is it possible to set import options when importing master data into SAC public dimensions?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Is it possible to set import options like update/append/clean and replace subset of data when importing master data into SAC public dimensions? I could not locate equivalent settings like those available for importing transaction data into SAC models.

Any tips or guidance would be highly appreciated! Thank you in advance.

SAP Analytics Cloud, data modeling

entry.title: How to set up the summary row function for summing calculations in a story report
entry.content: In the story report, there are a total of 10 rows. How to use the summation formula to calculate the total number of people in the column where the summation is performed?

entry.title: \nERROR BRAIN_DEV (135): Angef.Datenmenge zu groß.
entry.content:
Wir laden Plandaten aus unserem S/4HANA, in die SAC, aus der Tabelle ACDOCP. Im letztem Jahr konnten wir noch 4 Mio. Sätze in einem Lauf laden. Jetzt bricht der Import mit der Fehlermeldung:

Interner Serverfehler im SAP Analytics Cloud Agent: Termination message sent ERROR BRAIN_DEV (135): Angef.Datenmenge zu groß.

ab.

Was ist zu tun.

entry.title: Nevada Modified Business Tax
entry.content:
Hi Team,

How do i set up Nevada Modified Business Tax in SAP S/4 HANA.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: SAC SMA Function not generating any value
entry.content:
We are able to create a Simple Moving Average (SMA) calculation in our SAP Analytics Cloud model without any errors. However, the calculation does not return any values.

The calculated measure is created successfully and no validation or runtime errors are displayed, but the result is always blank when used in the model or in a Story.

Defination : SMA([Active_Emp] ,[d/Date],"Month" ,3 )

entry.title: SAC import connection: master data and property mapping from SuccessFactors
entry.content:
currently have SAC and SuccessFactors in scope, with only import connection. I can see master data APIs such as FOCOSTCENTER, FOCOMPANYCODE, FODIVISION, and FODEPARTMENT, but I could not find a master data API for the Position dimension.

I do see a Position table that includes measures and other dimensions, and it appears to contain the fields we need. My questions are:

  1. For Position master data and Employee, should we use the transactional data table and extract the required fields from that query to feed the master data?
  2. If we want to maintain mappings such as Department or Division as properties while loading Cost Center, how can that be achieved in SAC? 
  3. Since there is no middleware between SuccessFactors and SAC, and transformations must happen in SAC while creating the jobs, what is the recommended approach for handling this mapping logic?
  4. And what are the other options if Datasphere is not available?

https://help.sap.com/docs/successfactors-platform/sap-successfactors-api-reference-guide-odata-v2/mdf-foundation-object-entities?locale=en-US

Any guidance or best-practice examples would be appreciated.

Thanks

entry.title: Seamless Planning Error
entry.content:
We are getting an error message when adding / changing entries on a seamless planning dimension type account. 

  There is a brand new sap note which is describing exactly the error.

 https://me.sap.com/notes/3782435/E

Any updates for the above SAP Note?

entry.title: SAC/DSP to connect with SAP ECC (underlying oracle database)SAP 752 version to get live data ?
entry.content:
Hi Team

We have a requirement where client want to get in SAP SAC/DSP system with live data connections from SAP ECC underlying database is oracle/SAP 752 version .. .

possible solution we have thinking :-

1)if we create a CDS view in SAP ECC system and connect through SAP ERP connections and Can it  possible to get the CDS view as remote table in our SAC side ?
2) if we can create an Odata connection from SAC to SAP ECC , Can we get live data from the CDS views to SAC ?

Could you please suggest possible solution and which approach will  work and limitations here ? to achieve it, is there any configuration setting we need to do in SAP ECC side  , if yes please suggest. 

 can datasphere help to achieve the live data connections from ECC , please suggest if any?   

Regards

Sumit

entry.title: SAC Data Management: Scheduled Export Job to SFTP not showing under Export Jobs list
entry.content:
We are experiencing an issue in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) when creating a scheduled export job to a File Server / SFTP.

  1. After setting up and saving a schedule for an export job under Model > Data Management, the newly created job does not appear in the Export Jobs list section on the Data Management screen.

  2. While the scheduled job is visible under Manage Existing Schedules, we noticed that once the schedule executes for the first time, its Schedule Name has disappeared in the list, even though the recurring schedule remains active.
